title: Create: Chipped Cutting
description: Use the Create mechanical saw for easy mass production of Chipped blocks- just put the block you want as a filter in the saw and use any of the blocks from the same tag to turn it into the filtered block!
body:
**What this data pack does:**

**EVERY block variant present in Chipped** can be made via the **Create mechanical saw **for easy mass production of blocks!
_(Even ones that dont make sense like lanterns or leaves!)_

Just put the Chipped block you want as a filter of the mechanical saw and use any of the blocks with the same Chipped tag to turn it into the desired filtered block.


**Works with Chipped 3.0+ and Create 0.5+ tested on 1.19.2+**


**Older spiritual predecessors of this datapack that have been either discontinued or are for older versions of Create, Chipped and or Minecraft:**

[Chipped Create Compatibility](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/chipped-create-compatibility)

[Create - Mechanical saw Chipped compatibility](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-chipped-2-0-0-compat)
